<<< SEARCH
      -- k ≥ 1 (since m - n is even, its trailing zero count is ≥ 1).
      have h_k_pos : 1 ≤ k.toNat := by
        by_contra h_k0
        push_neg at h_k0
        have h_k0' : k.toNat = 0 := by omega
        rw [h_k0', pow_zero, Nat.div_one] at h_k_odd
        omega
      -- Discharge the inner trailing_zeros call.
      rw [h_tz_diff, pure_bind]
      -- Reduce (m - n) >>>? k.  For UInt64 >>>? UInt32, the instance
      -- generated by `declare_Hax_shift_ops` is:
      --   if 0 ≤ k && k < 64 then pure (x >>> k.toNat.toUInt64)
      --   else .fail .integerOverflow
      -- We need to show the boolean is true.
      have h_zero_le_k : ((0 : u32) ≤ k) = True := by
        apply propext; constructor
        · intro _; trivial
        · intro _; exact Nat.zero_le _
      -- The width-64 comparison: k < (64 : u32) iff k.toNat < 64.
      have h_k_u32_lt_64 : ((k : u32) < (64 : u32)) := by
        rw [UInt32.lt_iff_toNat_lt]
        exact h_k_lt_64
      have h_shr_bound :
          (decide ((0 : u32) ≤ k) && decide ((k : u32) < (64 : u32))) = true := by
        rw [show decide ((0 : u32) ≤ k) = true from
              decide_eq_true (UInt32.zero_le k)]
        rw [Bool.true_and]
        exact decide_eq_true h_k_u32_lt_64
===
      -- k ≥ 1 (since m - n is even, its trailing zero count is ≥ 1).
      have h_k_pos : 1 ≤ k.toNat := by
        by_contra h_k0
        push_neg at h_k0
        have h_k0' : k.toNat = 0 := by omega
        rw [h_k0', Nat.pow_zero, Nat.div_one] at h_k_odd
        omega
      -- Discharge the inner trailing_zeros call.
      rw [h_tz_diff, pure_bind]
      -- Reduce (m - n) >>>? k.  For UInt64 >>>? UInt32, the instance
      -- generated by `declare_Hax_shift_ops` is:
      --   if 0 ≤ k && k < 64 then pure (x >>> k.toNat.toUInt64)
      --   else .fail .integerOverflow
      -- We need to show the boolean is true.
      have h_k_u32_lt_64 : ((k : u32) < (64 : u32)) := by
        rw [UInt32.lt_iff_toNat_lt]
        exact h_k_lt_64
      have h_zero_le_k_bool : decide ((0 : u32) ≤ k) = true := by
        apply decide_eq_true
        rw [UInt32.le_iff_toNat_le]
        exact Nat.zero_le _
      have h_shr_bound :
          (decide ((0 : u32) ≤ k) && decide ((k : u32) < (64 : u32))) = true := by
        rw [h_zero_le_k_bool, Bool.true_and]
        exact decide_eq_true h_k_u32_lt_64
>>> REPLACE
